title: Diffs and patch review deterministic misconception check

publication.changeSummary: Deterministic misconception item for Diffs and patch review; blocked from formal exams until independent human review.

items.title: Diffs and patch review: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? One diff command always shows every change in the repository, including staged, unstaged, and untracked content.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Name or understand both comparison endpoints and inspect untracked status separately so no category of work is silently omitted.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Name or understand both comparison endpoints and inspect untracked status separately so no category of work is silently omitted.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction for Diffs and patch review instead of the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.

options.text: Name or understand both comparison endpoints and inspect untracked status separately so no category of work is silently omitted.
One diff command always shows every change in the repository, including staged, unstaged, and untracked content.

answer.explanation: Name or understand both comparison endpoints and inspect untracked status separately so no category of work is silently omitted.
